---
title: JSON Schema
description: Understanding the game server template JSON Schema.
---

The `game-server-template.schema.json` file in the project root defines the structure and validation rules for game server templates. This schema enables IDE support with autocomplete, validation, and inline documentation.

## Using the Schema

### Enabling Schema in Your Templates

Add the schema comment at the top of your template YAML files:

```yaml
# yaml-language-server: schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/andyslucky/nautikalpanel/refs/heads/main/game-server-template.schema.json
template_name: "My Game Server"
```

This comment tells YAML language servers (like the one in VS Code) which schema to use for validation.

### IDE Support

With the schema comment enabled, your IDE will provide:

- **Autocomplete** - Type-ahead suggestions for valid fields
- **Hover documentation** - Field descriptions when you hover
- **Real-time validation** - Error highlighting as you type
- **Structure validation** - Ensure required fields are present

#### VS Code

Install the **YAML** extension by Red Hat. It automatically detects the schema comment.

#### IntelliJ IDEA / CLion

Install the **YAML** plugin and the schema comment will be recognized automatically.

## Schema Structure

The schema is organized into these main sections:

### Root Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `template_name` | string | Yes | Display name shown in UI |
| `description` | string | No | Template description shown in UI |
| `game_type` | string | No | Unique game identifier (lowercase, no spaces) |
| `icon_url` | string (URI) | No | URL for server icon displayed in UI |
| `init_template` | string | No | Path to Jinja template for initial resources |
| `pod_config` | [PodConfig](#pod-configuration-pod_config) | Yes | Container and resource configuration |
| `service_config` | [SvcConfig](#service-configuration-svc_config) | Yes | Network and service exposure |
| `pvc_config` | [PvcConfig](#pvc-configuration-pvc_config) | Yes | Persistent storage configuration |
| `default_max_users` | integer | No | Default maximum number of players |
| `user_id` | integer | No | User ID for permissions to data stored in persistent volume. Used by sftp container and gameserver container for consistent file permissions. (default: 1000) |

### Pod Configuration (`pod_config`)

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `image` | string | Yes | Docker image to run |
| `resources` | [Resources](#resources-resources) | No | CPU and memory specifications |
| `command` | array of strings | No | Override container startup command |
| `env` | object | No | Environment variables (key-value pairs) |
| `mounts` | array | No | Additional volume mounts |

#### Resources (`resources`)

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `requests` | object | Minimum guaranteed resources |
| `limits` | object | Maximum allowed resources |

Both `requests` and `limits` contain:

| Property | Type | Pattern | Description |
|----------|--------|----------|-------------|
| `cpu` | string | `^[0-9]+m?$` | CPU in milli-cores (e.g., `500m`) or whole cores |
| `memory` | string | `^[0-9]+(Mi\|Gi)$` | Memory in Mi (megabytes) or Gi (gigabytes) |

### Service Configuration (`service_config`)

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `ports` | [Port[]](#ports-ports) | Yes | List of ports to expose (minimum 1) |
| `ip_address` | string | No | Optional specific IP for LoadBalancer |
| `service_type` | string | No | Kubernetes service type (default: `LoadBalancer`) |

#### Ports (`ports`)

Each port entry contains:

| Property | Type | Constraints | Description |
|----------|--------|--------------|-------------|
| `port` | integer | 1-65535 | Port number to expose |
| `protocol` | string | Enum | Must be `TCP`, `UDP`, or `Both` |

#### Service Type

Valid values for `service_type`:
- `LoadBalancer` - Cloud LoadBalancer (recommended for production)
- `NodePort` - Exposes on node's IP and static port
- `ClusterIP` - Internal only, requires port-forward

### PVC Configuration (`pvc_config`)

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `storage_class` | string | No | Optional Kubernetes storage class override |
| `container_path` | string | Yes | Mount path in the container |
| `size` | integer | Yes | Storage size number (minimum: 1) |
| `size_unit` | string | Yes | Storage unit (enum: `Mi` or `Gi`) |

## Example Valid Template

```yaml
# yaml-language-server: schema=./game-server-template.schema.json
template_name: "Minecraft Paper"
description: "High-performance Minecraft with plugins"
game_type: "minecraft-paper"
icon_url: "https://example.com/paper-icon.png"

pod_config:
  image: "itzg/minecraft-server"
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: "1000m"
      memory: "2Gi"
    limits:
      cpu: "4000m"
      memory: "8Gi"
  env:
    EULA: "TRUE"
    TYPE: "PAPER"
    VERSION: "latest"

service_config:
  ports:
    - port: 25565
      protocol: "TCP"
  service_type: "LoadBalancer"

pvc_config:
  size: 20
  size_unit: "Gi"
  container_path: "/data"
  storage_class: "fast-ssd"

default_max_users: 50
user_id: 1000
```

## Common Validation Errors

| Error | Cause | Fix |
|-------|--------|-----|
| `Missing required property` | Required field is missing | Add the missing field |
| `Property has wrong type` | Field value doesn't match type | Check data type (string vs. integer, etc.) |
| `Pattern does not match` | Value format is incorrect | Use correct format (e.g., `500m` for CPU, `1Gi` for memory) |
| `Value not in enum` | Enum value is invalid | Use one of the allowed values |
| `Value less than minimum` | Value is below allowed range | Increase value to meet minimum requirement |
| `Value greater than maximum` | Value exceeds allowed range | Decrease value to meet maximum requirement |

## Updating the Schema

If you need to modify the schema (e.g., add new fields or change validation rules):

1. Edit `game-server-template.schema.json`
2. Update the JSON Schema structure
3. Restart your YAML editor or reload the workspace

## Troubleshooting

### Schema Not Detected

If your IDE doesn't detect the schema:

1. Ensure the comment is at the **very top** of the file (line 1 or 2)
2. Check that the path is correct relative to the template file
3. Reload your IDE window
4. Verify your YAML extension supports schema comments

### Validation Errors Not Appearing

If you're not seeing validation errors:

1. Ensure the YAML extension is installed and enabled
2. Check the extension's output panel for errors
3. Try opening the schema file directly to verify it's valid JSON
4. Restart your IDE
